headline: Delta Malta Debut And Pacific Push Test Growth Versus Profit Pressures
summary: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) has launched its first-ever nonstop service between the U.S. and Malta. The carrier is also signaling a push to expand across the Pacific, positioning itself against United. These moves come as IATA warns that global airline sector profits could nearly halve this year. For investors watching NYSE:DAL, the new Malta route adds another international option at a time when leisure travel demand and interest in curated vacation experiences remain important themes for...
